results.title: Tamboran Resources: Well Cost Reductions Play A Key Role In Unlocking Beetaloo Basin
results.snippet: Tamboran is aiming to start commercial production in Australia's Beetaloo Basin later this year. Well cost reductions will play a key factor in unlocking the basin's potential as a future gas supply source.

results.title: 2Q FY26 Result Presentation
results.snippet: The presentation outlines Tamboran's most active year in the Beetaloo Basin with first gas sales targeted for 3Q 2026. Plans include stimulating remaining wells, backfill drilling, and progressing toward 40 MMcf/d plateau production.

results.title: Tamboran builds ~$198M war chest to unlock Beetaloo Basin growth ahead of first gas
results.snippet: Tamboran raised funds to accelerate Beetaloo Basin development as it approaches first gas. Processing infrastructure is nearly complete with initial production targeted at 40 MMcf/d in Q3 2026.

results.title: Tamboran Resources Corporation (TBN)
results.snippet: Tamboran Resources holds a large acreage position in the Beetaloo Basin and is developing natural gas resources. The company is preparing for commercial production start in 2026 with a focus on low emissions.

results.title: Tamboran (NYSE: TBN) advances Beetaloo gas project toward 3Q 2026 first sales
results.snippet: Tamboran is progressing stimulations, infrastructure, and drilling toward first gas sales from the Beetaloo Basin in 3Q 2026. The 2Q FY26 update highlights strong cash position and operational milestones.

results.title: ASX Announcements - Tamboran Resources Corporation
results.snippet: Tamboran Resources announced that the Shenandoah South Pilot Project reached FID on 30 Sep 2025, with additional ASX filings in April 2026 covering applications for quotation of securities and statements of CDIs on issue for stock code TBN.

results.title: ASX:TBN
results.snippet: This investor page provides financial results, income statements, balance sheets, and stock data for Tamboran Resources Corporation listed as both NYSE: TBN and ASX: TBN.

results.title: Tamboran Resources Corporation (TBN) Stock Price
results.snippet: Tamboran Resources Corporation develops unconventional natural gas resources in Australia's Beetaloo Basin with working interests in multiple exploration permits. As of April 2026 it reported an EPS of -1.86 with an estimated earnings date in May 2026.

results.title: Tamboran Resources Corporation (TBN)
results.snippet: Tamboran Resources Corporation is a natural gas company founded in 2009 and focused on the global energy transition. In April 2026 it announced the pricing and commencement of a public offering of common stock.

results.title: Tamboran Resources Corporation (ASX:TBN)
results.snippet: On 8 April 2026, Tamboran Resources (ASX:TBN) announced an underwritten public offering of common stock to fund drilling activities including the Beetaloo Central Development Area. The price-sensitive announcement saw shares trade at $0.260 after the release.

results.title: Equity Raise Presentation - Tamboran Resources Limited (ASX:TBN)
results.snippet: Tamboran Resources (ASX:TBN) released an equity raise presentation that discusses risks around Australian gas drilling, noting the company has no proved reserves and that drilling may not yield natural gas in commercial quantities.

results.title: Tamboran Resources Q2 FY26 slides: Beetaloo Basin development on track for first gas in 2026
results.snippet: Tamboran Resources updated on its Beetaloo Basin project in Australia, confirming development remains on track for first gas sales in 2026. The company plans to focus on drilling high-quality gas wells to support production goals.

results.title: TAMBORAN CDI FORUS [TBN] (TBN.XA) Q2 FY2026 earnings call
results.snippet: In its Q2 FY2026 earnings discussion, Tamboran outlined plans to drill two backfill wells in the first half of 2026 and additional wells on the SS-1 pad in Australia's Beetaloo Basin. These activities are part of a broader 2026 drilling and stimulation campaign to achieve production targets.

results.title: Tamboran Resources — Next Generation E&P Company.
results.snippet: Tamboran Resources (NYSE:TBN) is a natural gas exploration and production company focused on low CO2 unconventional gas resources in Australia's Northern Territory. The company aims to support net zero energy transition goals in Australia and the Asia-Pacific region through its drilling projects.

results.title: Tamboran (NYSE: TBN) advances Beetaloo gas project with 2026 drilling program
results.snippet: Tamboran Resources reported progress on its Beetaloo gas project, including completion of horizontal drilling and plans to stimulate additional wells in Q2 2026 ahead of first gas sales. The 2026 program includes backfill drilling to support plateau production in Australia.
